segments.text: Then I raised my eyes and looked, and behold, a man with a measuring line in his hand.
To measure Jerusalem, to see what is its width and what is its length.
segments.speaker: Angel

segments.text: And there was the angel who talked with me, going out; and another angel was coming out to meet him,
Run, speak to this young man, saying: 'Jerusalem shall be inhabited as towns without walls, because of the multitude of men and livestock in it.
segments.speaker: Angel

segments.text: For I will be a wall of fire all around her, and I will be the glory in her midst.
segments.speaker: The Lord

verses.title: Future Joy of Zion and Many Nations

segments.text: Up, up! Flee from the land of the north, for I have spread you abroad like the four winds of heaven.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Up, Zion! Escape, you who dwell with the daughter of Babylon.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: He sent Me after glory, to the nations which plunder you; for he who touches you touches the apple of His eye.
segments.speaker: The Lord of hosts

segments.text: For surely I will shake My hand against them, and they shall become spoil for their servants. Then you will know that the Lord of hosts has sent Me.
segments.speaker: The Lord of hosts

segments.text: Sing and rejoice, O daughter of Zion! For behold, I am coming and I will dwell in your midst.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Many nations shall be joined to the Lord in that day, and they shall become My people. And I will dwell in your midst. Then you will know that the Lord of hosts has sent Me to you.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: And the Lord will take possession of Judah as His inheritance in the Holy Land, and will again choose Jerusalem.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Be silent, all flesh, before the Lord, for He is aroused from His holy habitation!
segments.speaker: The Lord
